file_insights.purpose: Application entry point for E-Menum Enterprise QR Menu Platform

patterns_discovered.description: reflect-metadata is imported at the very top before any other code to enable tsyringe dependency injection
Bootstrap → Express App Creation → Server Startup with orchestration through main()
patterns_discovered.significance: Structured initialization ensures all dependencies are ready before server starts

patterns_discovered.description: Different middleware and logging behavior for development vs production
patterns_discovered.significance: Security and performance optimization across environments
Kubernetes-ready health check pattern for orchestration

patterns_discovered.description: SIGTERM and SIGINT handling with 30-second timeout for service cleanup
patterns_discovered.significance: Production-grade shutdown with coordination between server and services

patterns_discovered.description: Security → CORS → Parsing → Static Files → Custom Middleware → Routes → Error Handling
patterns_discovered.significance: Proper middleware ordering for functionality and security

patterns_discovered.description: Global error handler with environment-aware error exposure and 404 handler
patterns_discovered.significance: Production-safe error responses prevent information leakage

gotchas_discovered.description: Route mounting is marked as TODO - routes are not yet wired up to the Express app
gotchas_discovered.impact: Application currently has no business logic routes despite having the infrastructure in place

gotchas_discovered.description: View engine is set to EJS with hardcoded path './src/views', but no middleware is set up for rendering template routes
gotchas_discovered.impact: View rendering capability is configured but no routes use it

gotchas_discovered.description: Trust proxy setting is only applied in production, not development, which may cause IP detection issues during local development
gotchas_discovered.impact: IP-based features (rate limiting, logging) may report incorrect IPs in development

gotchas_discovered.description: Server forces shutdown after 30 seconds of graceful shutdown attempt without checking if services completed cleanup
gotchas_discovered.impact: Database connections or cache operations may be forcefully terminated mid-operation

gotchas_discovered.description: Extensive use of 'no-console' eslint-disable comments for logging, suggesting console is normally disabled in linting rules
gotchas_discovered.impact: May indicate non-standard logging patterns; consider using proper logger in production code

approach_outcome.description: Application entry point successfully created with comprehensive Express setup, health checks, and graceful shutdown handling
approach_outcome.completeness: Structurally complete with proper middleware stack and error handling, but functionally incomplete without route mounting
quality_indicators: Includes production-grade features (health checks, graceful shutdown, helmet security)
Proper error handling with global error handler
approach_outcome.blockers: Route mounting implementation is marked as TODO - dependent on module structure completion

recommendations.recommendation: Implement route mounting in createApp() function to connect module routes to the Express application
recommendations.rationale: Application currently accepts requests but has no business logic endpoints available

recommendations.recommendation: Enhance graceful shutdown to track pending operations and adjust timeout based on service shutdown completion
recommendations.rationale: Current 30-second hard timeout may interrupt database transactions or cache operations

recommendations.recommendation: Implement proper logger abstraction instead of console.log throughout the file
recommendations.rationale: Reduce eslint disable comments and enable structured logging for production use

recommendations.recommendation: Add trust proxy configuration for development environment pointing to localhost
recommendations.rationale: Ensure consistent IP detection behavior between development and production

recommendations.recommendation: Add comments explaining the purpose of each health check endpoint and their monitoring usage
recommendations.rationale: Kubernetes operators may not understand the distinction between /health, /health/ready, and /health/live

recommendations.recommendation: Ensure createApp and startServer exports are utilized in test files with proper server instance cleanup
recommendations.rationale: Exported functions indicate intent to support testing but no test files reference them yet
